summary: Tested Archetype Tone system implementation. The archetype copy utility (archetypeCopy.js) is correctly integrated into 3 components: ArchetypeProducts, CuratedBundles, and SoulMadeCollection. Dine page shows archetype-aware copy working correctly ('Social Butterfly' indicators, 'Made for Mojo', 'playdate' copy). Celebrate page has pre-existing 'Loading products...' issue that blocks component rendering.

integration_issues.issue: Page stuck on 'Loading products...' indefinitely when logged in - prevents ArchetypeProducts and CuratedBundles from rendering
integration_issues.note: This is a pre-existing issue from iteration_75 - not related to new Archetype Tone feature

action_items: EXISTING ISSUE: Fix Celebrate page 'Loading products...' infinite state - prevents archetype components from rendering
The archetype copy implementation is correct - components will work once Celebrate page loading issue is fixed
critical_code_review_comments: archetypeCopy.js utility is well-structured with 7 archetype definitions
ArchetypeProducts.jsx correctly imports and uses getPersonalizedGreeting, getProductIntro, getArchetypeDisplayInfo at lines 145-147
CuratedBundles.jsx correctly imports and uses getBundleIntro, getArchetypeDisplayInfo at lines 170-171
SoulMadeCollection.jsx correctly imports and uses getArchetypeDisplayInfo, getProductIntro at lines 549-550

success_rate.backend: 100% - Multi-factor-products API returns archetype (social_butterfly) and personalization scores correctly
success_rate.frontend: Dine page: 100% archetype copy visible. Celebrate page: Blocked by pre-existing loading issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Archetype Tone feature implementation is COMPLETE and WORKING. The archetypeCopy.js utility provides dynamic copy based on pet personality. Verified working on Dine page - shows 'Made for Mojo', 'Social Butterfly', archetype emojis. Celebrate page has separate loading issue unrelated to this feature.

celebrate_page_ui_verification.reason: Pre-existing 'Loading products...' issue prevents component rendering
